category_sources: source_facts.description identifies z80asm as an assembler for the Z80 microprocessor.
display_name_sources: Homebrew formula id and source_facts.homepage use the project name z80asm.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GNU Savannah project page and best documentation surface supplied.
repo_sources: Official Savannah project infrastructure provides the upstream Git repository for z80asm.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.homepage identify a Z80 assembler hosted by GNU Savannah.
